label: Anger
description: A general sense that something feels wrong, unfair, blocked, or violated.
feelsLike: Heat, tension, wanting to push back.
check: Am I upset and ready to confront something?

label: Aggravation
description: Low-to-moderate anger caused by obstacles, interruptions, or repeated hassle.
check: Am I irritated because something is making life harder?

label: Agitation
description: Activated, restless anger; emotionally stirred up and unable to settle.
check: Do I feel wound up more than directly angry?

label: Annoyance
description: Mild irritation, often over something petty or repetitive.
check: Is this minor, but still bothering me?

label: Bitterness
description: Anger mixed with hurt, resentment, or old disappointment. Often lingers.
thinking: I haven't gotten over what happened.
check: Is this connected to an old wound or unfairness?

label: Exasperation
description: Frustration pushed to the edge of 'I give up.'
thinking: I cannot deal with this anymore.
check: Am I angry because my patience is gone?

label: Ferocity
description: Intense, forceful, almost primal aggressive energy. Often protective or combative.
check: Does this feel fierce rather than merely angry?

label: Frustration
description: Anger caused by blockage — wanting something and being unable to get there.
check: Is something preventing me from doing what I want?

label: Fury
description: Explosive, consuming anger. Hard to contain.

label: Grouchiness
description: Irritable, negative mood where small things bother you. Often tied to tiredness, hunger, stress.
check: Am I generally prickly rather than angry about one thing?

label: Grumpiness
description: Like grouchiness, but often heavier, sulkier, lower-energy.
check: Am I more crabby than actively angry?

label: Hostility
description: Anger with antagonism toward a person or group.
check: Is my anger directed at someone as an adversary?

label: Indignation
description: Anger triggered by moral offense or injustice.
check: Am I upset because a principle was violated?

label: Irritation
description: Low-level, sharper annoyance — often sensory or interpersonal.
check: Is something rubbing me the wrong way?

label: Outrage
description: Big moral anger, often shocked anger.
check: Does this feel personal and morally offensive?

label: Rage
description: Extreme anger that can feel consuming and hard to control.
check: Does this feel dangerous or overpowering?

label: Vengefulness
feelsLike: Cold or hot desire to make someone suffer or 'even the score.'
check: Is retaliation part of what I'm feeling?

label: Wrath
description: Deep, severe, almost monumental anger — often moral, punishing, destructive.
check: Does this feel bigger and more severe than ordinary anger?
